lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't realise gnomes were interested in magic.

lines.speaker: Professor Imblewyn
lines.text: We have a saying, 'Curiosity killed the cat'. But cats aren't clever enough to understand what they find. Gnomes are.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey! Some of my best friends are cats!

lines.speaker: Professor Imblewyn
lines.text: I think that says more about you than cats.

lines.speaker: Professor Imblewyn
lines.text: Hmmm, I wonder... Oh. My order. Thank you - mind you don't get any food or drink on the books.

lines.speaker: Professor Imblewyn
lines.text: You must have had to travel a long way to get this to me. Here's a little something extra as a tip.
